funFacts: The brain of Stegosaurus was incredibly small, roughly the size of a walnut, despite the animal weighing up to 5 tons.
Stegosaurus was a herbivorous dinosaur from the Late Jurassic, famous for the double row of leaf-shaped bony plates running down its back.
